'''Treylon II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Treylon system/Legends|Treylon system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was the headquarters of [[Zygian Savings and Loan]] and the homeworld of [[Tour Aryon]].

{{Planet-stub}}
